question: When is the kickoff session for the AI Engineering Bootcamp?

What constraints apply to data and models in the capstone—dataset size, pre-trained only, API spend—and why are they in place?

What best practices does the program recommend before starting a SolidRoad session (internet, noise, role play), and what is the Soft Skills Learning Path?
